name: Alex Rivera
raw_profile:
Alex Rivera — Senior Technology Consultant

SUMMARY
Senior technology consultant with 9 years of experience delivering digital transformation and cloud migration engagements for financial services and insurance clients. Strong background in AWS architecture, microservices design, and legacy system modernization. Known for bridging the gap between technical execution and business stakeholder communication.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Consultant — Tikal Tech (2020–Present)
- Led a 14-month cloud migration program for a Tier-1 Israeli bank, moving 60+ legacy systems from on-prem to AWS. Reduced infrastructure costs by 35%.
- Architected a real-time fraud detection microservice platform for an insurance carrier. Processed 2M+ transactions/day with <100ms latency.
- Managed teams of 6–10 engineers across 3 concurrent client projects.
- Delivered executive-level weekly briefings; translated technical risk into business impact language.

Technology Consultant — DataCore Solutions (2017–2020)
- Designed and delivered a data warehouse modernization on Snowflake for a retail chain (180 stores). Cut reporting cycle from 3 days to 4 hours.
- Built CI/CD pipeline infrastructure using Jenkins, Docker, and Kubernetes for a logistics SaaS startup.
- Conducted technical due diligence for 2 acquisition targets in the FinTech space.

Junior Developer — StartupX (2015–2017)
- Full-stack development on a B2B SaaS platform (Python/Django, React, PostgreSQL).
- Implemented OAuth2 authentication and multi-tenant data isolation.

KEY SKILLS
- Cloud: AWS (EC2, RDS, Lambda, ECS, CloudFormation), some GCP
- Languages: Python, Java, SQL, some Go
- Architecture: Microservices, event-driven systems, domain-driven design
- Data: Snowflake, PostgreSQL, Kafka, Spark (basic)
- DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Jenkins, GitHub Actions
- Methodologies: Agile/Scrum, SAFe, TOGAF (certified)
- Soft: Executive communication, cross-functional team leadership, stakeholder management

PROJECTS (SELECT)
- Bank CloudShift: Led full cloud migration for a 3,000-employee bank. Delivered on time and 8% under budget.
- InsureFast Fraud Platform: Real-time ML-based fraud detection pipeline. 92% precision, saved client $4M/year.
- RetailDW Modernization: Snowflake migration + dbt transformation layer for a retail analytics platform.

EDUCATION
- B.Sc. Computer Science — Tel Aviv University (2015)

CERTIFICATIONS
- AWS Solutions Architect – Professional
- TOGAF 9 Certified
- Certified Scrum Master (CSM)

LANGUAGES: English (fluent), Hebrew (native), Spanish (conversational)

COMMUNICATION STYLE
Alex is direct and pragmatic in communication. He uses concrete examples and metrics rather than abstract frameworks. Formal enough for C-suite, but not stiff. Tends to acknowledge complexity honestly rather than overselling.
